title: Clean Completion on the Off-Camber Grass Section

issue_priority.issue: Minor line deviation observed during a clean completion

what_you_were_trying_to_do: You were riding across a flat grass section with a moderate off-camber and aiming to stay balanced and complete the line cleanly.
what_actually_happened: You completed the section cleanly. There was a visible line_deviation on the off-camber, but it did not lead to a stall, crash, or loss of completion.
closing: You got through the section cleanly and kept the ride together well.
